description: CompositionBlack T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a round neck, short sleeves and graphic print on the chestFitRegularWash careMachine wash at 40 degrees with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleachTumble dry normal or line dryWarm iron; do not iron on decorationsGo nostalgic and re-live the excitement of the circus with this T-shirt from locomotive. Crafted from soft cotton fabric to offer exemplary comfort which, combined with the stylish graphic print of the circus, makes this tee a great addition to your casual wardrobe. Pair it with jeans and sports shoes.Model statisticsThe product is a size L on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
